specific_mechanism: PETERSEN-MoE: 10 experts at Petersen vertices + 3-regular adjacency mask + chromatic-3 group-consistency loss + vertex-transitive symmetric routing matrix
llm_application: Place 10 experts at vertices of a small fixed graph with each vertex degree 3 and no short cycles; mask soft-routing weights to only allow routing along graph edges; partition experts into 3 color-groups and add a group-consistency loss; constrain the routing matrix to respect the graph's vertex-symmetry.
novelty_claim: Topology-aware MoE methods use input-side descriptors; this candidate is the first to use a FIXED structured-graph EXPERT-side adjacency with chromatic group-consistency.
